snippet: the Dc becomes encapsulated at its base as the Dp (NDP + , SOX2 + )
RSPO3 from the Dp was predicted to interact with LGR4 and LGR6 in overlying matrix cells to contribute to the proliferation of HF epithelial cells

we observed a high number of matching TFs across pseudotime, which indicated that there are similar activated gene regulatory programs between prenatal skin and SkO during HF fibroblast differentiation
